top_signals.title: Euronext CEO: Europe Benefiting from Volatility
top_signals.summary:
Euronext has posted first-quarter earnings that beat analysts' expectations, with profit driven higher by elevated market volatility and the newly acquired Athens stock exchange contributing to revenue.

Speaking exclusively to The Opening Trade, CEO Stéphane Boujnah said Europe is benefiting from a search for diversification coming from Asia and Middle East investors, who see the continent is less directly exposed to the Iran conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CAB, Europol secure another 500 BTC likely tied to Irish drug trafficking case
top_signals.summary: Irish authorities secured another 500 BTC after accessing a second dormant wallet likely tied to the long-lost Clifton Collins bitcoin cache.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Max-severity flaw in ChromaDB for AI apps allows server hijacking
top_signals.summary: A max-severity vulnerability in the latest Python FastAPI version of the ChromaDB project allows unauthenticated attackers to run arbitrary code on exposed servers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
